recommendations.title: Fluke
recommendations.overview: Workaholic Thomas Johnson dies in an auto accident and reincarnates as a dog. Remembering some of his previous being, he returns to his wife and son to protect them from the man who caused his accident. But, as time goes by, his memories return, and

recommendations.title: Blackmail
recommendations.overview: When Dev finds about his wife's affair, he starts blackmailing her and her lover but the blackmail game backfires on him.

recommendations.title: Jeruzalem
recommendations.overview: When a couple of American young adults fly to Israel to visit the city of Jerusalem, a biblical nightmare falls upon the city.

recommendations.title: ¿Y Cómo Es Él?
recommendations.overview: Thomas is a meek man on the verge of a nervous breakdown. Despite his situation he decides to fake a work trip to go to Vallarta to confront Jero, a taxi driver who is sleeping with his wife.

recommendations.title: The Brats
recommendations.overview: Newly engaged, Thomas meets his future father-in-law Gilbert, who has been married for 30 years to Suzanne. Disillusioned Gilbert is convinced that his marriage has meant he's missed out on life. He persuades Thomas not to marry his daughter Lola and

recommendations.title: A Tale of Love and Darkness
recommendations.overview: The story of young Amos Oz, growing up in Jerusalem in the years before Israeli statehood with his parents; his academic father, Arieh, and his dreamy, imaginative mother, Fania.

recommendations.title: Breakdown

recommendations.title: Synonyms
recommendations.overview: A young Israeli man absconds to Paris to flee his nationality, aided by his trusty Franco-Israeli dictionary.

recommendations.title: Smoke Signals

recommendations.title: Possession
